commands.review_summary:
The branch adds beta desktop distribution verification before release publish, channel-specific prerelease Sparkle appcast paths, release docs/tests, cron tool provider-schema compatibility repairs, and related CI shard fixes.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes for the merge blockers from source: PR head selects appcast-alpha.xml for alpha builds without an alpha verifier, and the base-to-head diff removes the Telegram isolation settings added by release-branch commit 0f2732b066ba.
